nasb.text: Have you not done this to yourself By your forsaking the Lord your God When He led you in the way?

esv.text: Have you not brought this upon yourself by forsaking the Lord your God, when he led you in the way?

cnv.text: 你這不是自作自受嗎？ 耶和華你的　神在路上引導你時， 你卻離棄了他。

ccb.text: 你这不是自食其果吗？ 因为你的上帝耶和华一路引导你的时候， 你却背弃祂。
